privileged_info_summary: The brightness_adjust task uses a real Unsplash underexposed portrait image (photo-1544005313-94ddf0286df2, 800x1199px, 43.4% dark pixels) with a brighter fallback image (photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d, 800x1200px). The verifier checks brightness adjustment by requiring >= 10% luminance increase with < 5% highlight clipping and >= 10% meaningful pixel changes. However, the verifier incorrectly claims to implement ITU-R BT.709 luminance formula but actually uses ITU-R BT.601 coefficients (0.299, 0.587, 0.114 instead of the correct 0.2126, 0.7152, 0.0722). The task.json file contains no metadata field contrary to what might be expected.
